flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at California State Polytechnic University-Humboldt are 27% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($47.6k vs $65.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State Polytechnic University-Humboldt rose 50% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State Polytechnic University-Humboldt rose 17% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.4k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State Polytechnic University-Humboldt fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
